result.claim: Tree-based algorithms such as Random Forest and Gradient Boosting were used.

result.claim: LGBMRegressor and XGBRegressor algorithms were used.

result.claim: Hyperparameter tuning was done using the Optuna framework.
result.original_text: hyperparameter tuning was done using the model-agnostic Optuna framework

result.claim: The best model was selected using mean Q2 and RMSE for tenfold cross-validation and R2 and RMSE for test samples.
result.original_text: The best model was selected using the following metrics: mean Q2 and RMSE for tenfold cross-validation and R2 and RMSE for test samples.

result.claim: Tenfold cross-validation R2 for SAR prediction is 0.86.

result.original_text: R2 = 0.78 and R2 = 0.75 for prediction of r1 and r2 relaxivities, respectively.

result.claim: Tenfold cross-validation R2 for r2 relaxivity prediction is 0.75.
result.original_text: R2 = 0.78 and R2 = 0.75 for prediction of r1 and r2 relaxivities, respectively.

result.claim: RMSE for SAR prediction on tenfold cross-validation is 0.28 and on test samples is 0.26.
result.original_text: For SAR prediction, RMSE of 0.28 on tenfold cross-validation dropped to 0.26 on test samples

result.claim: RMSE for r1 relaxivity prediction on tenfold cross-validation is 0.30 and on test samples is 0.27.
result.original_text: for r1 and r2 relaxivities, RMSE dropped from 0.30 to 0.27

result.claim: RMSE for r2 relaxivity prediction on tenfold cross-validation is 0.25 and on test samples is 0.22.

result.claim: Q2 on cross-validation for r2 relaxivity prediction increased from 0.63 to 0.71.
